summary: Added Owlory's first maintained XCUITest smoke lane: a debug-only deterministic fresh-day seed, stable Today dashboard accessibility identifiers, a wired OwloryUITests target, and repeatable make ui-smoke validation with isolated DerivedData.
validations_failed: make ui-smoke initially failed because the first test asserted the old welcome surface; inspection showed TodayStore creates a fresh-day dashboard after reset, so the seed/test/docs were corrected and make ui-smoke passed.

make test-domain DOMAIN=today initially failed with an Xcode build database lock because it was run concurrently with make test-domain DOMAIN=runtime against the shared /tmp/owlory-validate-xcode DerivedData path; it was rerun sequentially and passed.

contract_status_changes.before: Owlory had running-app smoke and screenshot proof artifacts, but no maintained XCUITest target.
contract_status_changes.after: Owlory has a first-class OwloryUITests target wired into the Xcode project and shared Owlory scheme.

contract_status_changes.before: UI proof relied on ad-hoc simulator state or manual setup for app data.
contract_status_changes.after: Debug launches with --owlory-ui-testing --owlory-ui-seed-fresh-day reset app-local Owlory and legacy Trajectory application-support data, skip notification authorization prompts, and let TodayStore create a deterministic fresh-day dashboard.

contract_status_changes.before: UI hygiene docs prohibited claiming XCUITest coverage until a target and documented seed path existed.
contract_status_changes.after: make ui-smoke runs the single maintained Today dashboard launch-surface XCUITest with /tmp/owlory-ui-smoke-derived-data.

contract_status_changes.before: Architecture lint and review preflight documented UI hygiene but did not guard the existence of an orphaned UI test directory or recommend make ui-smoke.
contract_status_changes.after: Architecture lint fails if OwloryUITests exists without project wiring or make ui-smoke, and review preflight recommends make ui-smoke for UI proof/test path changes.

residual_risks: The XCUITest suite intentionally contains one launch-surface smoke test only; it is not broad UI regression coverage.
No repo-managed screenshots were preserved for this slice, so screenshot-verified proof is not claimed.

The fresh-day seed only resets app-local application-support data in Debug builds; future flows that need richer records should add focused fixture seeding rather than expanding this smoke implicitly.
Device and TestFlight behavior remain unverified.
recommended_next_reason: If Owlory needs repeatable multi-screen flow proof, the next small slice should add one richer deterministic fixture and one focused XCUITest flow rather than growing a broad UI regression suite.
